personal.name: Bala S
personal.tagline: I build polished web products with clean architecture, thoughtful UX, and reliable delivery.
personal.about: I am a product-minded developer focused on building fast, accessible, and maintainable applications. I enjoy turning ambiguous ideas into well-structured interfaces, scalable frontend systems, and practical admin workflows that teams can actually use.
personal.availability: Available for freelance and full-time roles

contact.title: Contact

projects.title: Editable Portfolio CMS
projects.subtitle: A data-driven portfolio with an admin dashboard and local persistence.
projects.description: Built a React portfolio where all site content comes from JSON, while the admin dashboard lets non-developers manage projects, skills, experience, and contact data after deployment.

projects.title: Analytics Dashboard
projects.subtitle: A reporting interface for product and revenue teams.
projects.description: Designed and implemented a responsive analytics workspace with filterable charts, saved views, and exportable reports for operational decision-making.

projects.title: Booking Platform
projects.subtitle: A scheduling app for service businesses.
projects.description: Created booking flows, calendar availability, customer notifications, and admin tools for managing services, time slots, and staff schedules.

experience.summary: Lead frontend delivery for customer-facing SaaS products, design systems, and internal CMS workflows.
highlights: Improved application performance by refactoring data-loading patterns and reducing render overhead.
Built reusable component systems used across multiple product teams.
Partnered with design and product leads to turn ambiguous feature briefs into shipped workflows.

experience.summary: Delivered full-stack applications for ecommerce, scheduling, and operations clients.
highlights: Created API integrations, authentication flows, and responsive dashboards.
Introduced automated testing practices for high-traffic client projects.

education.details: Focused on software engineering, databases, human-computer interaction, and web systems.
